name: City Food Festival
description: A nearby food festival draws more diners into town. Business booms for the month.

name: Critical Health Inspection
description: An unexpected health inspection finds minor violations. Fines are issued and reputation is dented.

name: Celebrity Visit
description: A local celebrity posts about your restaurant. Customers queue for days and publicity soars.

name: Supply Shortage
description: Key ingredient suppliers are delayed. Menu items are limited and costs rise.

name: Viral Rave Review
description: A glowing online review goes viral. A sudden spike in customers follows.

name: Kitchen Fire
description: A small fire damages equipment. You close for a few days and pay for repairs.

name: Seasonal Rush
description: Tourists arrive for the season. Foot traffic increases steadily for the month.

name: Equipment Failure
description: A major piece of kitchen equipment fails and must be replaced. Service slows until it is fixed.

name: Local Protest
description: A protest near the block scares off customers for a while.

name: Ingredients Price Spike
description: Wholesale food costs rise unexpectedly, increasing operating costs this month.

name: Toilet flooded
description: A major plumbing failure forces a temporary closure and repairs.

name: Winter storm
description: Severe weather keeps customers home and reduces foot traffic.

name: Dwayne Johnson Eats Here
description: A surprise visit from a huge celebrity draws massive attention.

name: TikTok Viral
description: A viral video drives a sudden spike in customers and publicity.

name: Bad Review
description: An influential critic posts a negative review. Reputation and traffic suffer.

name: Sponsor Catered
description: A sponsored event brings extra revenue but also temporary overhead.

name: Spice Challenge
description: A spicy food challenge attracts daring customers and creates social buzz at some cost.

name: Sponsor Partnership Offer
description: A local brand offers a paid partnership: pay for branded nights to boost reputation.

name: Chef Training Workshop
description: Invest in a weekend workshop for your chefs to improve quality and reviews.

name: Risky Pop-Up Deal
description: A trending pop-up collective invites you. It brings high visibility with a risk of backlash.

name: Local Charity Event
description: Donate to a charity gala. It costs money but can significantly improve your reputation.

name: Interdimensional Pop-Up
description: A vendor from somewhere not-quite-here wants to rent your kitchen for a night. The flavors are impossible and the crowds are curious.

name: Glow-in-the-Dark Soup Night
description: A mysterious chef insists on serving luminescent broth. People take strange selfies and some leave whispering haikus.

name: Chef Swap with a Mole
description: A literal mole is hired as a guest chef for authentic subterranean flavor. The idea is questionable but gets people talking.

name: Sentient Spoon Strike
description: Utensils stage a small, polite strike demanding better polish. Service slows while negotiations occur.

name: Time-Loop Happy Hour
description: For one night, the hour repeats three times. You can try to game it, but reviews remember the consequences.

name: Whispering Menu
description: The menu starts whispering recommendations to patrons. Sales shift unpredictably as diners chase suggestions.
